docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, BRAD AS TO DEFENDANT RAI, SANJEEV DBA IMPRINT COPY AND PRINT, DBA COLOR GRAPHICS, DBA MAX COPY IMPRINT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
